description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is looted from Blackrock Slayer. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
name: Recipe: Mighty Rage Potion

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Mighty Rage Potion Item Level 51 Requires Alchemy (255) Use: Teaches you how to make a Mighty Rage Potion.
